name: O-13 --strict elevates a deprecated-token finding from severity=warn to exit code one per §26
command: mkdir -p src && printf 'const c = tokens.color.legacy.red;\n' > src/c.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/design-token-freshness.sh" --registry "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/design-tokens/registry.yaml" --paths src --strict 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && echo elevated 1>&2
